synthesis.target_compound: GaAs quantum dot membrane (GaAs/AlGaAs QD sample structure)

steps.description: Grow a sacrificial layer of Al0.75Ga0.25As on a 350 µm thick GaAs (001) commercial substrate in a MBE system.
Deposit a 4 nm thick layer of GaAs to protect the AlGaAs matrix from oxidation.
Deposit a first 69 nm thick layer of Al0.33Ga0.67As.
Evaporate Al on the surface to form droplets that drill highly symmetric nanoholes on the surface (Al-droplet-etching-epitaxy technique).
Fill the nanoholes with a 1.5 nm thick layer of GaAs to form the quantum dots.
Cap with another 70 nm thick layer of Al0.33Ga0.67As for a total membrane thickness of roughly 140 nm.
Protect the structure with another 4 nm thick layer of GaAs, bringing the total thickness to 148 nm.

synthesis.notes: The optically active area consists of a layer of GaAs QDs obtained via the Al-droplet-etching-epitaxy technique placed at the centre of a 140 nm thick Al0.33Ga0.67As layer sandwiched between two 4-nm thick GaAs protective layers. An Al0.75Ga0.25As sacrificial layer is grown below the active layer to enable substrate removal. Total membrane thickness is 148 nm.

steps.description: Growth of a sacrificial layer of Al0.75Ga0.25As on a 350 µm thick GaAs (001) commercial substrate.
Deposition of a 4 nm thick layer of GaAs to protect the AlGaAs matrix from oxidation.
Growth of a first 69 nm thick layer of Al0.33Ga0.67As.
Evaporating Al on the surface to form droplets drilling highly symmetric nanoholes on the surface (Al-droplet-etching-epitaxy).
Filling the holes with a 1.5 nm thick layer of GaAs to form quantum dots.
Capping with another 70 nm thick layer of Al0.33Ga0.67As.
Protection with another 4 nm thick layer of GaAs bringing the total thickness to 148 nm.

steps.description: Grow a sacrificial layer of Al0.75Ga0.25As on a GaAs (001) substrate.
Deposit a 4 nm thick layer of GaAs to protect the AlGaAs matrix from oxidation.
Grow a first 69 nm thick layer of Al0.33Ga0.67As.
Evaporate Al on the surface to form droplets drilling highly symmetric nanoholes on the surface (Al-droplet-etching-epitaxy technique).
Fill the holes with a 1.5 nm thick layer of GaAs.
Cap with another 70 nm thick layer of Al0.33Ga0.67As for a total membrane thickness of roughly 140 nm.
Protect the structure with another 4 nm thick layer of GaAs, bringing the total thickness to 148 nm.
